dashboard.label: Queue Drop Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Queue drop monitoring with data retained for 14 days

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="queue" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + queue_name | sort 0 _time device_queue | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_queue | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats dc(device_queue) as queues_with_drops

panel.title: Total New Queue Drops per Device

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="queue" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + queue_name | sort 0 _time device_queue | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_queue | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats sum(drop_increment) as total_new_drops by device_name | sort -total_new_drops

index=main analyzer_type="queue" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + queue_name | sort 0 _time device_queue | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_queue | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | timechart span=5m sum(drop_increment) as "Queue Drop Increments"

index=main analyzer_type="queue" | eval device_queue = device_name + ":" + queue_name | sort 0 _time device_queue | streamstats current=f last(current_value) as prev_drops by device_queue | eval drop_increment = coalesce(current_value - prev_drops, 0) | where drop_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(drop_increment) as "New Drops", latest(current_value) as "Total Drops", latest(port) as "Port", latest(txq) as "Queue" by device_name, queue_name | sort - "New Drops" | head 20 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
